backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing person and expense management with CRUD operations for people, expense creation, and filtered queries by person/date with timestamp-based date range calculations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old expense schema (with 'person' field) to new schema (with 'personId' field) while initializing empty people map and preserving expense IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including people management UI, person selector in expense form, quick-add functionality, and person detail views with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components describing their functionality, including forms, lists, views, hooks, and styling configurations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for UI components including sidebar, charts, and financial data display.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Daily Expenses Entry application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing three-tab navigation (Expenses, People, Summary) and view state for switching between main tabs and person detail view with navigation handlers.
frontend/src/components/ExpenseForm.tsx: Expense creation form with person dropdown selector, quick-add person functionality, amount/description/category/date inputs using react-hook-form and shadcn/ui components with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ExpenseList.tsx: Displays a table of all expenses with date, person, category, description, and amount columns. Supports optional person click handler and shows loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main application layout with header showing app title and rupee symbol, main content area, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/PeopleManagement: Manages people entities with add, edit, and delete functionality displayed in a table. Includes form validation and toast notifications for user feedback.
Shows per-person expense breakdown for a given year or month, calculating total expenses, daily averages, and expense counts. Supports optional person click handler.
frontend/src/components/PersonDetailView: Displays detailed expense history for a specific person with summary statistics (total, daily average, unique days) and a table of all their expenses with categories.
frontend/src/components/SummaryView.tsx: Provides tabbed monthly and yearly expense summaries with year/month selectors, showing total expenses and daily averages. Integrates PersonBreakdown component for detailed breakdowns.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state, creating AuthClient with configurable options, and handling identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on people and expenses, including listing people, creating/updating/deleting people, fetching person-specific and all expenses with optional year/month filters, and creating expenses.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, plus utility classes for currency display formatting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context wrapping the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH, typography settings, financial-themed shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting a daily expenses tracking application with Indian Rupee support, listing implemented features including expense entry forms, list views, summaries with daily averages, people management, and professional financial UI design.
